title: SiTime Q2 2024 Earnings - Significant Beat with Strong Segment Growth
text: Revenue for the quarter was $43.9 million which was well above guidance of $40 million to $42 million. This performance exceeded analyst estimates of $41.00 million in revenue. Q2 revenue was $43.9 million, up 58% year on year and up 33% sequentially with growth in each of our end markets. Non-GAAP gross profit was $25.3 million (57.7% of revenue). Sales into the communications, enterprise, and data center market were $15.2 million, up 208% year on year and 55% sequentially. Sales into the automotive, industrial, and aerospace market were $14.8 million, increasing 20% year on year and 15% sequentially. Sales into the mobile, IoT and consumer market were $13.8 million, up 33% year on year and 34% sequentially. The company ended the quarter with $452.5 million in cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments.
